title: Python Developer
skills: Development Life Cycle, Javascript, React.Js, AWS, Python, SQL, Development, Python Development
description:
We are looking for a motivated Python Developer with 05 years of experience to join our development team. The ideal candidate should have a strong foundation in Python programming, problem-solving skills, and a willingness to learn and work on real-world applications.

**Key Responsibilities**
- Write clean, efficient, and reusable Python code
- Develop, test, and maintain backend systems and APIs
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams (frontend, QA, DevOps)
- Debug and troubleshoot applications
- Work with databases and optimize queries
- Participate in code reviews and improve coding standards
- Learn and adapt to new tools, frameworks, and technologies

**Required Skills**
- Strong knowledge of Python programming
- Understanding of OOP (Object-Oriented Programming)
- Familiarity with web frameworks like Django or Flask
- Basic knowledge of REST APIs
- Experience with databases such as MySQL, PostgreSQL, or MongoDB
- Understanding of Git/version control
- Basic understanding of data structures and algorithms

**Preferred Skills (Nice to Have)**
- Experience with FastAPI or modern Python frameworks
- Knowledge of Docker or containerization
- Familiarity with AWS, Azure, or cloud platforms
- Exposure to CI/CD pipelines
- Basic understanding of frontend technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript)
role_summary: We are looking for a motivated Python Developer with 05 years of experience to join our development team. The ideal candidate should have a strong foundation in Python programming, problem-solving skills, and a willingness to learn and work on real-world applications.
required_skills: Python programming, OOP (Object-Oriented Programming), Django, Flask, REST APIs, MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Git/version control, data structures and algorithms, FastAPI, Docker, AWS, Azure, CI/CD pipelines, HTML, CSS, JavaScript
